prayer.title: Prayer
prayer.subtitle: Share your heart with us
prayer.intro: The CIFM4 community intercedes for you, just as the Church in Acts 2 — united in prayer. Every request is received with kindness and brought before God.
prayer.request_placeholder: Share your prayer intention with us…
prayer.contact_placeholder: Email or phone if you'd like us to follow up
prayer.public_label: Make this prayer visible on the prayer wall
prayer.success: Your prayer has been received with love. The CIFM4 community is interceding for you. God bless you.
prayer.error_request_short: Your request is too short (10 characters minimum).
prayer.scripture: "Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God."
prayer.verse: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them."

give.title: Support CIFM4
give.subtitle: Your gift supports our community's mission
give.intro: Your generosity allows us to pursue our mission: promoting the Word of God, supporting those in need and building a strong community founded on the principles of Acts 2. Every gift, no matter the size, makes a difference.
give.reference_note: Always mention "CIFM4 Donation" in your transfer so your gift is properly identified.
give.scripture: "Bring the whole tithe into the storehouse, that there may be food in my house. Test me in this, says the LORD Almighty."

about.title: About
about.mission_text: International Community of the Sons of Malachi 4 (C. I. F. M. 4) is a non-profit Christian organization with the following objectives:
about.objective_1: Promote the Word of God (Holy Bible), directly and especially through online media (Internet)
about.objective_3: Promote the communal lifestyle of the Christians of Acts 2
about.objective_4: Provide help to the marginalized, without any distinction, and offer them reintegration support
about.objective_5: Welcome people in difficulty with material, moral and spiritual support
about.objective_6: Make the biblical message available (Bible and various Christian publications)
